Deal Done

Thank you

We really appreciate you choosing Flog My Caravan. We hope the whole thing was as quick and painless as promised.

A quick favour?

We're a small local outfit, and honest reviews are the number-one way other sellers decide to trust us. If you've got 30 seconds, a Google review would mean the world.

Leave a Google Review

Opens Google — takes about 30 seconds

  1. 1Tap the button above — it opens our Google page.
  2. 2Sign in with your Google account if it asks.
  3. 3Pick 5 stars, add a few words, and hit post. Done!
No Google account?

No problem — you can leave us a review on Facebook instead. It helps just as much.

Review us on Facebook

Not quite 100% happy? Please give Tom the chance to put it right first — call 07514 478254 or message us on Messenger.
